onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/quick_tune.schema.json, set qt_gravity to {{qt_gravity}}]
Set gravity to {{qt_gravity}} px/s² in the game physics. Higher = fruits fall faster. Current: restitution={{qt_restitution}}, drop_cooldown={{qt_drop_cooldown}}

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/quick_tune.schema.json, set qt_restitution to {{qt_restitution}}]
Set restitution (bounciness) to {{qt_restitution}} in the game physics. Higher = more bouncy. Current: gravity={{qt_gravity}}, damping={{qt_damping}}

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/quick_tune.schema.json, set qt_drop_cooldown to {{qt_drop_cooldown}}]
Set drop cooldown to {{qt_drop_cooldown}} seconds in the game. Lower = faster drops. Current: game_over_delay={{qt_game_over_delay}}

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/quick_tune.schema.json, set qt_game_over_delay to {{qt_game_over_delay}}]
Set game over grace period to {{qt_game_over_delay}} seconds. Longer = more forgiving. Current: drop_cooldown={{qt_drop_cooldown}}

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/quick_tune.schema.json, set qt_damping to {{qt_damping}}]
Set friction damping to {{qt_damping}} per second. Higher = items settle faster. Current: gravity={{qt_gravity}}, restitution={{qt_restitution}}

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/overview/quick_tune.schema.json, set qt_score_pulse to {{qt_score_pulse}}]
Set score pulse scale to {{qt_score_pulse}}x on merge. Higher = more dramatic feedback.
